title: menziesia ferruginea subsp. glabella
intro: Menziesia ferruginea subsp. glabella, also known as the rusty menziesia, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Menziesia ferruginea subsp. glabella include its potential to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
